meaning: vt.举行就职典礼,创新,开辟,举行开幕(落成、成立)典礼.
examples: Afghanistan is due to inaugurate a parliament.
Q: the 8th China-ASEAN Expo will inaugurate tomorrow. Please brief us on the attendance of ASEAN leaders.
In 1971, invited to inaugurate the International Year for Action to Combat Racism, levi-strauss gave a lecture entitled Race and Culture.
Over two weekends later this month it will inaugurate its own program, Open Streets!
Meriwether Lewis Clark Jr. decided to inaugurate a race in his home state of Kentucky.
